MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
RICK COOPER present as a representative of plaintiffs Ginocchio/Cooper LLC and AGJ, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD RE: PLAINTIFFS GINOCCHIO/COOPER, LLC AND AGJ, LLC.

The Court indicates that Mr. Cooper did not notify movant of his intent to appear at today's hearing.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

The Court informs Mr. Cooper that the order will become effective upon plaintiffs counsel's service of the order on plaintiffs.

Regarding Mr. Cooper's extension request, the Court indicates that Mr. Cooper may communicate to plaintiffs' counsel that counsel should make the extension request on plaintiffs' behalf.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
